title: Sijil Taraf Bumiputera - Kontraktor Kerja
issuer: Kementerian Pembangunan Usahawan dan Koperasi — Pusat Khidmat Kontraktor
brief: Federal-level Bumiputera status certificate tied to the company's CIDB G7 registration, issued by the Pusat Khidmat Kontraktor. This is separate from the Sarawak state-level UPKJ Bumiputera recognition shown elsewhere on this page.
